summary: T-Mobile subscriber live game in market - Final Game State w/ Saving Pitcher
description:
GIVEN the user is a T-Mobile subscriber
AND the in-market game has a game state of Final
AND the game has ended less than 90 minutes ago
AND the game has a saving pitcher
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MASTepg
AND the feed level mediaState equals MEDIA_ARCHIVE
AND the game is not a partner game

**NOTE:** wiremock favorite team 121 Mets, gamePk - 1100002316

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill is not displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is not displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header don't have a dark overlay
